title: The Best of the World's Classics, Restricted to Prose, Vol. VI (of X)—Great Britain and Ireland IV

This volume includes a variety of selections from notable British and Irish authors, chronicling significant themes, events, and reflections from the 19th century. The anthology features contributions from writers such as John Henry Newman, Edward Bulwer Lytton, Charles Dickens, and Charles Darwin, making it a rich source of literary and historical insights.
